1. Object struct in src/object/mod.rs:1156 is missing Thing trait implementation. The Thing trait requires: get_template(), get_position(), set_position(), get_angle(), set_angle()

2. External type implementations in src/common/types.rs around lines 826-848 that violate Rust's orphan rule

4. Missing BehaviorModuleInterface implementations in various behavior modules

Please start with the Object struct - add the missing fields (angle: Real, thing_template: Option<Arc<dyn ThingTemplate>>) and implement the Thing trait methods. Then work through the other issues systematically.

The goal is to get cargo build to succeed with no errors.
